heading: Filing of the plan
label: 1189 Filing of the plan
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title

children.heading: .—Who May File a Plan
children.label: a .—Who May File a Plan
children.text: Only the debtor may file a plan under this subchapter.

children.heading: .—Deadline
children.label: b .—Deadline
children.text: The debtor shall file a plan not later than 90 days after the order for relief under this chapter, except that the court may extend the period if the need for the extension is attributable to circumstances for which the debtor should not justly be held accountable.
